home.heroSubtitle: A global movement dedicated to the spiritual revival and moral reformation of the Muslim Ummah through the practice of Dawah.
home.featuredSubtitle: Explore lectures, articles, and guidance from scholars.
home.eventsSubtitle: Join gatherings and programs in your area.
home.principlesSubtitle: The six fundamental points that form the foundation of our work.
home.principle1Desc: The declaration of faith — La ilaha illallah Muhammadur Rasulullah. Affirming the oneness of Allah and the prophethood of Muhammad ﷺ.
home.principle2Desc: Establishing the five daily prayers with concentration and devotion, as performed by the Prophet ﷺ.
home.principle3Desc: Acquiring knowledge of the Deen and engaging in the remembrance of Allah throughout the day.
home.principle4Desc: Honoring and respecting every Muslim, fulfilling their rights with sincerity and compassion.
home.principle5Desc: Purifying one's intention in every action, seeking only the pleasure of Allah.
home.principle6Desc: Inviting people towards the path of Allah, spending time and effort in the way of Dawah.

about.title: About Tablighi Jamaat
about.description: Learn about our history, mission, and guiding principles.
about.historyP1: Tablighi Jamaat was founded in 1926 by Maulana Muhammad Ilyas Kandhlawi (rahimahullah) in Mewat, India. It emerged as a grassroots movement to revive the basic teachings of Islam among Muslims who had drifted away from their faith.
about.historyP2: What began as a small local effort has grown into one of the largest Islamic movements in the world, present in over 150 countries. The movement emphasizes personal spiritual development, community bonding, and the practice of Dawah — inviting others to the path of Allah.
about.historyP3: The movement operates without formal organizational structures, relying instead on the dedication and sincerity of its participants. Its simplicity and focus on core Islamic values have been the key to its widespread acceptance.
about.missionP1: Our mission is the spiritual revival of the Muslim Ummah through the practice of Dawah and personal reformation. We believe that every Muslim has a responsibility to invite others towards goodness and to embody the teachings of the Prophet Muhammad ﷺ in daily life.
about.visionP1: A world where every Muslim lives by the complete teachings of Islam, contributing to peace, harmony, and the well-being of all humanity.
about.methodP1: The Tablighi Jamaat method is based on Mashwara (consultation), voluntary participation, and self-reformation through spending time in the path of Allah. Participants go on Jamaat (groups) to various areas, engaging with local communities and encouraging each other in faith and practice.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with us for inquiries, guidance, or to find your nearest Markaz.
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you soon, InshaAllah.
contact.locationDesc: Visit your nearest Markaz (center) for daily programs, weekly gatherings, and guidance.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about Tablighi Jamaat.

donate.title: Support the Movement
donate.description: Your contribution helps sustain the work of Dawah and community development.
donate.introP1: Sadaqah (charity) is one of the most beloved acts to Allah. The Prophet Muhammad ﷺ said: "Charity does not decrease wealth." (Sahih Muslim)
donate.introP2: Your generous contributions help maintain Masjids, support Dawah programs, fund educational initiatives, and assist those in need within our communities.
donate.howP1: Contributions can be made directly at your local Markaz or Masjid. Please contact your nearest center for details on how to support the movement.
donate.way1Desc: Contribute towards the maintenance of Masajid, travel expenses for Jamaat, and community welfare programs.
donate.way2Desc: The greatest contribution is giving your time in the path of Allah. Join a Jamaat and spend time in Dawah.
donate.way3Desc: If you are a scholar or student of knowledge, contribute by teaching and sharing beneficial knowledge.
donate.way4Desc: Never underestimate the power of sincere Du'a. Pray for the success of this effort and the guidance of the Ummah.
donate.reminderP1: "Who is it that would loan Allah a goodly loan so He may multiply it for him many times over?" — Quran 2:245

footer.aboutText: Tablighi Jamaat is a global Islamic movement dedicated to spiritual revival through the practice of Dawah and self-reformation.
footer.madeWith: Made with sincerity for the Ummah
